title: source.register.batch
description: Register one or more directories as RegisteredSources in a single call. Used by the first-run Finish step to flush the working source buffer to SQLite (R-Batch, A9). Atomically: if ALL items fail, nothing is committed. On partial success the items that succeeded are committed; failed rows are reported with per-item error codes. 'path.already.registered' on a row is treated as success and returns the existing source_id (idempotent — D1).

sources.description: Ordered list of sources to register. Index is preserved in the response item array.

kind.description: Which source category this directory belongs to.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path to a readable directory. Server normalizes to OS-canonical form.

kind_subtype.description: Optional category refinement (reserved; unused at first-run).

scan_depth.description: How deep to scan this root. Default 'recursive'. Exposed as advanced/collapsed disclosure in the wizard (R-Wiz-1).

status.description: 'success' when every item succeeded. 'partial' when at least one item succeeded and at least one failed. 'failure' when every item failed — in this case no rows are committed (atomic rollback).

items.description: Per-item outcome, in the same order as the request sources array.

index.description: Zero-based index into the request sources array.

source_id.description: Assigned or existing source_id on success.

error.description: Error code from the source.register error set, or 'path.already.registered.different_kind' (R-1.4), when status='failure'.

error_detail.description: Optional structured detail (e.g. conflicting_kind for path.already.registered.different_kind).

sources.empty.description: The sources array is empty. At least one source is required.
